Part.Source: parm(in:&parEmpCod, in:&parFilCod, in:&parPedCod, in:&parPedItmCod, in:&inParSelGrupCod, in:&inparPrincipalProCod, in:&inparPrincipalProGraCod);

Event Start
tbConfirmarRemocaoItem.Visible = 0 &PedItmCod = &parPedItmCod &ParSelGrupCod = &inParSelGrupCod &parPrincipalProCod = &inparPrincipalProCod &parPrincipalProGraCod = &inparPrincipalProGraCod loadwwpContext.Call(&wwpContext)
do 'LoadPedido' do 'loadproduto' do 'loadComposicao'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
TableMain.Width = 900 TableMain.Height = 900 panelObsProduto.Width = 300 UnnamedTable11.Height = 50 &PrincipalPedVlrUnt.Visible = False &MdpVenQtdMeio.Visible = False &QtdItensComposicao.Visible = False &PedItmCod.Visible = False sdtComplemento__OGrupCod.Visible = False sdtComplemento__OGrupNom.Visible = False &OGrupCodRef.Visible = False &CompGrupCod.Visible = False &OGrupValorMoeda.Visible = False sdtObservacao__OGrupCod.Visible = False sdtObservacao__OGrupNom.Visible = False &ObsGrupCod.Visible = False &ProNom1.Visible = False &ProNom.Visible = False sdtObservacaoGrupo__OGrupCod.Visible = False &ComposicaoProRef.Visible = False &ComposicaoPedVlrUnt.Visible = False sdtObservacaoGrupo__OGrupSel.Visible = False sdtObservacaoGrupo__OGrupQtd.Visible = False sdtObservacaoGrupo__OGrupVlr.Visible = False sdtObservacaoGrupo__OGrupCodRef.Visible = False
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
&FiltroProNom.SetFocus()
EndEvent
Event GridCOmplementos.Load
sdtComplemento__OGrupCod.Visible = False sdtComplemento__OGrupNom.Visible = False
&OGrupCodRef = &sdtComplemento.CurrentItem.OGrupCodRef &CompGrupVlrVarchar.SetEmpty() &CompGrupNom = &sdtComplemento.CurrentItem.OGrupNom &CompGrupCod = &sdtComplemento.CurrentItem.OGrupCod &OGrupValorMoeda = RetornaPrecoUnitarioVenda.UDP(&parEmpCod, &TabCod, &TabPrmCod, &CompGrupCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod, &TabColCod, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaVct) &CompGrupVlrVarchar = 'R$ '+ trim(toformattedString(&OGrupValorMoeda))
&CompGrupQtd = RetornaQuantidadeAdicionada_Complemento.Udp(&parEmpCod, &parFilCod, &parPedCod, &CompGrupCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod, &PedItmCod)
ttbComplementoNome.Width = 200 ttbComplementoAdicao.Width = 160
if &PedItmCod > 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
RemoveComplemento.Visible = true AddComplemento.Visible = true Else RemoveComplemento.Visible = False AddComplemento.Visible = False Endif
EndEvent
Event Observacao.Load
sdtObservacao__OGrupCod.Visible = False sdtObservacao__OGrupNom.Visible = False
ttbObservacao.Width = 290 ttbObsNome.Width = 190
&ObsGrupNom = &sdtObservacao.CurrentItem.OGrupNom &ObsGrupCod = &sdtObservacao.CurrentItem.OGrupCod
if &PedItmCod > 0 RetornaIsAdicionadaObservacao.Call(&parEmpCod, &parFiLCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod, &ObsGrupCod, &ObsGrupNom, &ObsGrupQtd)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
RemoveObservacao.Visible = true AddObservacao.Visible = true Else
RemoveObservacao.Visible = False AddObservacao.Visible = False &ObsGrupQtd = 0 Endif
EndEvent
Event GridComposicao.Load
tbIten.Width = 150 tbIten.Height = 35
&ComposicaoProRef = &sdtObservacaoGrupo.CurrentItem.OGrupCodRef &ComposicaoPedVlrUnt = RetornaPrecoUnitarioVenda.UDP(&ParEmPCod, &TabCod, &TabPrmCod, &sdtObservacaoGrupo.CurrentItem.OGrupCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod, &TabColCod, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaVct)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRemoveComplemento'
if &CompGrupQtd > 0 and &PedItmCod > 0 &CplPedItmCod = 0 GravaItemCatalago_RemoveComplemento.Call(&parEmpCod, &parFiLCod, &parPedCod, &OGrupCodRef, &OGrupValorMoeda, &PedItmCod, 'C', &PedSts, &LctRetCus, &TabCod, &TabPrmCod, &TabColCod, &PedDtaEms, &PedPerSrv1, &PedPerSrv2, &PedPerPrm1, &PedPerPrm2, &PedPerSpm1, &PedPerSpm2, -1, &PedItmVenCod, &Mensagem, &ProTipDef, &CplPedItmCod, &wwpContext.UserName) &CompGrupQtd = RetornaQuantidadeAdicionada_Complemento.Udp(&parEmpCod, &parFilCod, &parPedCod, &CompGrupCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod, &PedItmCod) do 'AtualizaTotalItem' Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAddComplemento'
&CplPedItmCod = 0 if &PedItmCod > 0 GravaItemCatalagoProduto.Call(&parEmpCod, &parFiLCod, &parPedCod, &OGrupCodRef, &OGrupValorMoeda, &PedItmCod, 'C', &PedSts, &LctRetCus, &TabCod, &TabPrmCod, &TabColCod, &PedDtaEms, &PedPerSrv1, &PedPerSrv2, &PedPerPrm1, &PedPerPrm2, &PedPerSpm1, &PedPerSpm2, 1, &PedItmVenCod, 'NADA', &Mensagem, &ProTipDef, &CplPedItmCod, &wwpContext.UserName) GravaItemReferencia.Call(&parEmpCod, &parFiLCod, &parPedCod, &CplPedItmCod, &PedItmCod, 'C') &CompGrupQtd = RetornaQuantidadeAdicionada_Complemento.Udp(&parEmpCod, &parFilCod, &parPedCod, &CompGrupCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod, &PedItmCod) do 'AtualizaTotalItem' Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoObsAvulsa'
if &PedItmCod > 0 wpObsAvulsaCatalago.Popup(&parEmpCod, &parFiLCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod) do 'AtualizaTotalItem' Refresh Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRemoveObservacao'
if &PedItmCod > 0 and &ObsGrupQtd > 0 GravaObservacaoProduto.Call(false, &parEmpCod, &parFilCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod, &ObsGrupCod, &ObsGrupNom ) RetornaIsAdicionadaObservacao.Call(&parEmpCod, &parFiLCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod, &ObsGrupCod, &ObsGrupNom, &ObsGrupQtd) do 'AtualizaTotalItem'
EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoAddObservacao'
if &PedItmCod > 0 GravaObservacaoProduto.Call(true, &parEmpCod, &parFilCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod, &ObsGrupCod, &ObsGrupNom ) RetornaIsAdicionadaObservacao.Call(&parEmpCod, &parFiLCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod, &ObsGrupCod, &ObsGrupNom, &ObsGrupQtd) do 'AtualizaTotalItem' Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Enter
&FiltroProNom.SetFocus()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoTudoPronto'
Return
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoRemoverProduto'
if &PedItmCod > 0 btnRemoverProduto.Visible = 0 tbConfirmarRemocaoItem.Visible = 1 &ConfirmarEmissao = 'CONFIRMA O CANCELAMENTO DO ITEM?' Else return Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoNaoConfirmar'
btnRemoverProduto.Visible = 1 tbConfirmarRemocaoItem.Visible = 0
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoSimConfirmar'
if &PedItmCod > 0 DeletaItemPedidoCompra.Call(&parEmpCod, &parFilCod, &ParPedCod, &PedItmCod) Return Else return Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GXUITabsPanel_tbtabs.TabChanged
&TabSelecionada = GXUITabsPanel_tbtabs.ActivePage if &TabSelecionada = 2 observacao.Refresh() GridCOmplementos.Refresh() Endif
EndEvent
Event tbIten.Click
if &QtdItensComposicao < &MdpVenQtdMeio or &MdpVenQtdMeio.IsEmpty() if &PedItmCod = 0 //GRAVA PRINCIPAL GravaItemPedidoVenda.Call(&parEmpCod, &parFilCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod, &parPrincipalProCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, '', &PedItmVenCod, 0, &InseridoMensagem, &AlteradoMensagem, &wwpContext.UserName) Endif //GRAVA COMPOSICAO GravarComposicaoNoPedido.Call(&ParEmpCod, &parFilCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod, 'ADD', &MdpVenQtdMeio, &ComposicaoProRef, &ComposicaoPedVlrUnt, &wwpContext.UserName)
do 'AtualizaTotalItem' do 'AtualizaTotalPedido' Endif
EndEvent
Event 'F3 | ADD'
3 // &sdtObservacaoGrupoAux = &sdtObservacaoGrupo if &QtdItensComposicao < &MdpVenQtdMeio or &MdpVenQtdMeio.IsEmpty() For &sdtObservacaoGrupoItem in &sdtObservacaoGrupo
&ComposicaoProRef = &sdtObservacaoGrupoItem.OGrupCodRef &ComposicaoPedVlrUnt = RetornaPrecoUnitarioVenda.UDP(&ParEmPCod, &TabCod, &TabPrmCod, &sdtObservacaoGrupoItem.OGrupCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod, &TabColCod, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaVct)
if &ComposicaoPedVlrUnt > 0 if &PedItmCod = 0 //GRAVA PRINCIPAL GravaItemPedidoVenda.Call(&parEmpCod, &parFilCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod, &parPrincipalProCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod, 1, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, '', &PedItmVenCod, 0, &InseridoMensagem, &AlteradoMensagem, &wwpContext.UserName) Endif //GRAVA COMPOSICAO GravarComposicaoNoPedido.Call(&ParEmpCod, &parFilCod, &parPedCod, &PedItmCod, 'ADD', &MdpVenQtdMeio, &ComposicaoProRef, &ComposicaoPedVlrUnt, &wwpContext.UserName)
do 'AtualizaTotalItem' do 'AtualizaTotalPedido' Endif
Exit EndFor Endif
EndEvent
Event &FiltroProNom.IsValid
&sdtObservacaoGrupo = FiltraSDT_Composicao.Udp(&sdtObservacaoGrupoTot, &FiltroProNom) if not &FiltroProNom.IsEmpty() &FiltroProNom.setfocus() Endif
EndEvent
Sub 'AtualizaTotalPedido'
RetornaTotalPedido.Call(&parEmpCod, &ParFilCod, &ParPedCod, &PedVlrBrt, &PedVlrLiq, &PedVlrDscGlb)
EndSub
Sub 'AtualizaTotalItem'
txtAvisoMaximoAlcancado.Caption = '' RetornaObsProduto.Call(&parEmpCod, &ParFilCod, &ParPedCod, &PedItmCod, &ObsProduto) RetornaObs_composicao.Call(&parEmpCod, &ParFilCod, &ParPedCod, &PedItmCod, &TotComposicaoPedVlrUnt, &ObsComposicao) RetornaObs_Complementos.Call(&parEmpCod, &ParFilCod, &ParPedCod, &PedItmCod, &TotComplementoPedVlrUnt, &ObsComplemento) tbTotComposicao.Visible = &TotComposicaoPedVlrUnt > 0 tbTotComplemento.Visible = &TotComplementoPedVlrUnt > 0
&SelPedVlrUntTot = &TotComposicaoPedVlrUnt + &TotComplementoPedVlrUnt if &TotComposicaoPedVlrUnt = 0 &SelPedVlrUntTot += &PrincipalPedVlrUnt Endif &QtdItensComposicao = RetornaTotalItensComposicao.UDP(&parEmpCod, &ParFilCod, &ParPedCod, &PedItmCod)
if &QtdItensComposicao >= &MdpVenQtdMeio and &MdpVenQtdMeio > 0 txtAvisoMaximoAlcancado.Caption = 'QUANTIDADE MÁXIMA DE '+trim(str(&MdpVenQtdMeio))+' COMPOSIÇÕES ALCANÇADA!' txtAddComposicao.Caption = '' Else txtAvisoMaximoAlcancado.Caption = '' txtAddComposicao.Caption = 'F3 | ADICIONA PRIMEIRA COMPOSIÇÃO' Endif
EndSub
Sub 'LoadPedido'
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod Where EmpCod = &parEmpCod Where FilCod = &parFilCod Where PedCod = &parPedCod
&PedSts = PedSts &LctRetCus = LctRetCus
&PedPerSrv1 = PedPerSrv1 &PedPerSrv2 = PedPerSrv2 &PedPerPrm1 = PedPerPrm1 &PedPerPrm2 = PedPerPrm2 &PedPerSpm1 = PedPerSpm1 &PedPerSpm2 = PedPerSpm2
&TabCod = TabCod &TabPrmCod = TabPrmCod &TabColCod = TabColCod &PedDtaEms = PedDtaEms &PedDtaVct = PedDtaVct &PedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq Exit EndFor
if &parPedItmCod > 0 For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod, PedItmCod Where EmpCod = &parEmpCod Where FilCod = &parFilCod Where PedCod = &parPedCod Where PedItmCod = &parPedItmCod
&PedItmCod = PedItmCod &ParSelGrupCod = GrupCod &parPrincipalProCod = ProCod &parPrincipalProGraCod = ProGraCod Exit EndFor EndIf
do 'AtualizaTotalItem'
EndSub
Sub 'loadproduto'
For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod //PRODUTO Where EmpCod = &parEmpCod Where ProCod = &parPrincipalProCod
&ProTipDef = ProTipDef
&PrincipalProGraRef = ProRef &PrincipalProNom = ProNom
&SelGrupCod = iif(&ParSelGrupCod.IsEmpty(), GrupCod, &ParSelGrupCod)
&ProMdpCod = ProMdpCod do 'modalidade'
For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod //PRODUTO GRADE Where ProGraCod = &parPrincipalProGraCod
&PrincipalProGraRef = ProGraRef &PrincipalProNom = ProNomGra Exit EndFor
Exit EndFor &PrincipalPedVlrUnt = RetornaPrecoUnitarioVenda.UDP(&ParEmPCod, &TabCod, &TabPrmCod, &parPrincipalProCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod, &TabColCod, &PedDtaEms, &PedDtaVct)
EndSub
Sub 'modalidade'
&MdpVenQtdMeio = 0 //MODALIDADE For Each Order EmpCod, MdpCod, MdpItmCod Where EmpCod = &ParEmPCod Where MdpCod = &ProMdpCod Where MdpItmCod = &parPrincipalProGraCod &MdpVenQtdMeio = MdpVenQtdMeio Exit EndFor txtAviso.Caption = iif(&MdpVenQtdMeio > 1, 'PERMISSÃO MÁXIMA DE ' + trim(str(&MdpVenQtdMeio)) + ' COMPOSIÇÕES', '')
EndSub
Sub 'loadComposicao'
&sdtObservacaoGrupoTot = RetornaSdt_Composicao.udp(&parEmpCod, &SelGrupCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod) &sdtObservacaoGrupo = &sdtObservacaoGrupoTot
&sdtObservacaoTot = RetornaSdt_Observacao.udp(&parEmpCod, &SelGrupCod) &sdtObservacao = &sdtObservacaoTot
&sdtComplementoTot = RetornaSdt_ComplementoComposicao.udp(&parEmpCod, &SelGrupCod, &parPrincipalProGraCod) &sdtComplemento = &sdtComplementoTot
EndSub
